description.value: Aura strong varied; CL 12th; Slot â; Price 4,000 gp; Weight â DESCRIPTION This stone sustains the wearer without food or water. Cracked: This stone sustains the wearer on half the normal amount of food. Price: 1,000 gp. Flawed: This stone sustains the wearer without food but he must consume twice the normal amount of water. Price: 2,000 gp. See Inferior Ioun Stones for details on cracked and flawed variant stones. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item; Special creator must be 12th level; Cost 2,000 gp.
